title: Glass
body:
# GLASS

**(Forge/Fabric)**

[![Donations ❤](https://i.imgur.com/IQZ7IrP.png)](https://ko-fi.com/confusedmodder)

The aim of this mod is to add many more varieties of glass building blocks.

Currently, this mod is in very early stages, however it includes a variety of cosmetic glass building blocks.

## Features:

### Horizontal Glass Panes

These are great for glass ceilings or skylights, and come in all stained colours.

To get a Horizontal Glass Pane, simply place a normal pane in the crafting grid, and it will convert into a horizontal pane. You can also place a horizontal pane in the crafting grid to change it back into a normal pane.

### Glass Door and Trapdoor

![Glass door and Trapdoor](https://i.imgur.com/xI57Qho.png)

Coming in all stained glass variants, these are good for getting more light into a building. The trapdoor can also be used as a new form of window.

The glass door is crafted similar to a normal door. The trapdoor is crafted by using four blocks of glass in a 2x2 shape.

![Glass door and Trapdoor recipes](https://i.imgur.com/X3sQPtY.png)

### Copper Framed Glass (1.19+)

These are brand new variants of glass blocks, adding a new variety of glass colours to the game, but still following a vanilla theme.

These come as a full blocks, panes and horizontal panes, and doors and trapdoors.

To craft these, place a waxed copper (normal, weathered etc.) block in the middle of the crafting grid, surrounded by glass blocks.

![Copperglass](https://i.imgur.com/UlGYlSe.jpeg)
